response.overview: In addition to the final performance (April 20) of the nationwide arena tour "Perfume 10th Tour ZOZ5 "Nebula Romance" Episode 1" held to celebrate the 25th anniversary of the formation and the 20th anniversary of their major label debut, the "Perfume ZO/Z5 Anniversary "Nebula Romance" Episode TOKYO DOME" (September 23), two performances that symbolize Perfume's milestones, are packaged as a complete version.  In addition, approximately 147 minutes of bonus footage is included, including the MC at each location, highlights from "P.T.A. 's Corner," selected performance footage from the arena tour, and the MC from the first day of the Dome performance. The content allows viewers to relive the tour from multiple angles.
response.title: Perfume ZO/Z5th Anniversary "Nebula Romance" -Complete Edition-
